meta.venue: Ribeira do Neiva, Duas Igrejas, Vila Verde, Braga, Portugal

concept.core: New moon — event falls on the actual new moon date
concept.vibe: Manifestation ritual with electronic music. Opening a new cycle.
concept.note: Spiritual themes are internal guiding principles, not all explicit on public website.

venue_detail.name: Ribeira do Neiva
venue_detail.location: Duas Igrejas, Vila Verde, Braga, Portugal
venue_detail.indoor_outdoor: outdoors (open air), with indoor backstage/private zone
venue_detail.history: Multiple successful parties thrown at this location before — known quantity
venue_detail.parking: Large parking area in village, ~2 min walk to venue.

venue_technical.sound_system: Rented via equipment company (part of €3000 package)
venue_technical.power_primary: Tap from power lines — cables provided by stage crew. Common local practice.
venue_technical.power_backup: Generator available via municipality president if needed
venue_technical.stage_plan: Request from municipality president — they have a new stage to lend. Tiago needs to talk to president.
venue_technical.toilets: Some onsite, mobile Dixies requested from municipality
venue_technical.bar_kitchen: Handled entirely by Duas Igrejas — they keep profits. Includes 1 free drink per ticket holder.
venue_technical.alcohol_license: Held by Duas Igrejas parish organization — their NIF, their license

success_definition.tiago_priority: FULL ROOM — non-negotiable, primary emotional goal.
success_definition.david_priority: Break-even minimum + full room + community feeling
success_definition.synthesis: Full room is the headline goal. Break-even is a floor. Profit → Edition 3.

tickets.scanning_system: QR code scanning via Shotgun app at door, physical buyers get wristbands

payout.iban_holder: David Pereira (personal) — to be migrated to parish IBAN per 2026-04-14 decision

critical_upfront.purpose: Equipment deposit (sound + lights + DJ) — due before event

break_even.note: Floor = deposits only. Full = artist balances + bonuses paid (only fires if event sells well). Display = rounded figure shown on dashboard.

artists_guaranteed.note: Verify split vs the €1500 Tiago mentioned verbally

budget.critical_cashflow_note: Shotgun pays out ~24h after event ends. All pre-event costs (€2725) come from cash-in-hand (€5000).

pending.name: Wristband supplier
pending.notes: Two colors: adult + 13-17 (white). Check if Shotgun provides.

decisions.title: Legal umbrella via Duas Igrejas parish
decisions.decision: Operate under Duas Igrejas parish NIF. They manage the bar, permit, and insurance umbrella.
decisions.rationale: Established community relationship, simplifies compliance, bar is theirs to run (and they keep the profits).
decisions.implication: Parish is a true partner. Event branding is Beat Nonstop but legally tied to the parish community.

decisions.title: Ticket platform = Shotgun.live
decisions.decision: Use Shotgun.live for ticket sales via embedded widget on beatnonstop.live.
decisions.rationale: European focus, MB WAY support (~45% of PT payments), fair fees, widget keeps checkout on our domain.
decisions.implication: Shotgun organizer account under Duas Igrejas parish NIPC + parish IBAN (see 2026-04-14 entry, which supersedes earlier personal-NIF plan).

decisions.title: Shotgun legal entity = Duas Igrejas parish NIPC (supersedes personal-NIF plan)
decisions.decision: The Shotgun organizer account and connected Stripe payout run under the Duas Igrejas parish NIPC with a parish-controlled IBAN. All ticket revenue flows to the parish account; Beat Nonstop reconciles with the parish post-event.
decisions.rationale: Shotgun rejected the initial submission because a personal NIF cannot legally front commercial ticket sales at this scale without the seller being registered as sole trader (recibos verdes) — which would reshape David Pereira's tax/social-security position for a one-off event. The parish is already the legal umbrella for the bar, permit, and alcohol license, so extending that umbrella to ticketing is the coherent move.
decisions.implication: Parish is the merchant of record on Shotgun. Event branding stays Beat Nonstop, operations stay with the team, but legal/financial flow runs through the parish.

decisions.title: Event concept — Lua Nova
decisions.decision: Celebrate the actual new moon of May 16. Cosmic / celestial aesthetic.
decisions.rationale: Genuine coincidence with the astronomical new moon. Theme hasn't been done locally.
decisions.implication: Decor + marketing lean celestial. Spiritual/manifestation language kept for community context, not on the public site.

decisions.title: Age policy: 13+ with wristband tiering
decisions.decision: Admission from age 13. White wristband for 13–17 (no alcohol, free soft drink). Adult wristband for 18+. Under-13 not admitted, no exceptions.
decisions.rationale: Families with teens are normal in Vila Verde culture. 18+ would cut real attendees. Wristband system protects the parish alcohol license.
decisions.implication: Door team ID-checks anyone who looks under 25. Bar staff briefed: 'no wristband or white wristband = no alcohol, no exceptions.' Parent consent form for 13–17.

decisions.title: Artist payment structure
decisions.decision: Cash, no contracts. 3 artists paid (Sun Profile €300, Kika Lewis €400, John €750). 4 artists unpaid. 50% upfront. €100 success bonus to 6 non-Tiago artists if event succeeds.
decisions.rationale: Friend-based network. Contracts would add bureaucracy incompatible with this culture.
decisions.implication: Daily contact with artists is the substitute for legal enforceability. Trust is the mechanism.

decisions.title: Flat pricing (no Early Bird)
decisions.decision: Single price €15 from launch through door. Duo Pack €20 (2 tickets, €10 each). VIP and T-shirt pack deferred until stage layout + merch design are ready.
decisions.rationale: Simplifies marketing. Scarcity driver is the event itself, not ticket tiers.

decisions.title: Domain = beatnonstop.live
decisions.decision: Purchased beatnonstop.live from GoDaddy. Connected to GitHub Pages.
decisions.implication: All marketing links point to beatnonstop.live. Public site + planning dashboard live on same domain.

decisions.title: Coordination system = Telegram bot + /sync + repo
decisions.decision: Deploy the bot architecture described in ARCHITECTURE.md. Telegram is the team's interface; the dashboard is the human view on the shared state; /sync runs once a day.
decisions.rationale: Non-technical team, need agentic behavior, cost-controlled via Claude Max subscription.
decisions.implication: Every outbound action from the bot requires 2 👍 votes from non-builder members.

pending_decisions.title: Door staff identity
pending_decisions.options: Trusted friend (volunteer or paid), ideally female for tone. Fallback: split shifts.

pending_decisions.title: VIP table configuration
pending_decisions.options: Depends on stage vendor's platform dimensions.

pending_decisions.title: T-shirt pack
pending_decisions.options: Launch with merch design ready vs. skip for this edition.

high.impact: Legal + human: injury without response. Parish license on the line.
high.mitigation: Secure volunteer first-aider or contract a paramedic by May 3. Budget €150.

high.impact: Parish loses license, fines, reputation damage
high.mitigation: Strict wristband system (white 13–17, adult 18+). ID check at entry. Bar staff briefing before doors.

medium.mitigation: 50% upfront deposit creates commitment. Daily contact. Have 1 backup DJ identified.
Application submitted via Duas Igrejas. Confirm by May 3.
Tarp contingency for equipment. 'Rain or shine' in ticket terms. Monitor forecast from May 10.
Monitor weekly against thresholds in monitoring.md. Push marketing if trailing.
Follow up with phone call after email. Offer guestlist pair.
Confirm parish umbrella covers event by Apr 26.

medium.impact: Blended avg €/ticket drops, break-even shifts up
medium.mitigation: Track Duo/Geral ratio weekly. If >60% Duo by Apr 26, consider limited premium tier.

low.mitigation: Different target audience, small party. No action needed.
Clear policy: under-13 not admitted, no exceptions.

low.risk: Shotgun iframe blocked on some device

resolved.notes: Verified. Event live on Shotgun with successful test purchase.
